name: Y2K
author: akellainmotion
description: Bubbly shapes, bright gradients, chrome effects, early-2000s nostalgia

componentOverrides.button: bg-gradient-to-r from-pink-400 to-purple-400 text-white rounded-full font-bold px-6 py-3 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#7B68EE] hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_#FF69B4] hover:scale-105 transition-all border-2 border-purple-300
componentOverrides.card: bg-white rounded-3xl border-2 border-purple-200 shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#7B68EE] p-6
componentOverrides.input: bg-white rounded-full border-2 border-purple-300 focus:border-pink-400 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-pink-200 px-5 py-2
componentOverrides.badge: bg-gradient-to-r from-cyan-300 to-purple-300 text-purple-900 rounded-full font-bold text-xs px-3 py-1
componentOverrides.alert: bg-gradient-to-r from-pink-50 to-purple-50 border-2 border-purple-200 rounded-3xl p-4
